import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut start = -1
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    mut b = 0
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(v)
      b = v
    when None
      b = 0
    end
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_ws
      if start >= 0
        let tok = string.substring(s, start, i)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          result = list.push(result, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
        start = -1
      end
    else
      if start < 0
        start = i
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if start >= 0
    let tok = string.substring(s, start, n)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn get_at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match xs.get(i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn top_k_desc(_ nums: List<Int>, _ k: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = nums
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut count = 0
  let n = remaining.len()
  let target = if k < n
    k
  else
    n
  end
  while count < target
    let rn = remaining.len()
    mut max_idx = 0
    mut max_val = get_at(remaining, 0)
    mut j = 1
    while j < rn
      let cur = get_at(remaining, j)
      if cur > max_val
        max_val = cur
        max_idx = j
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    result = list.push(result, max_val)
    mut new_remaining: List<Int> = []
    mut p = 0
    while p < rn
      if p == max_idx
        ()
      else
        new_remaining = list.push(new_remaining, get_at(remaining, p))
      end
      p = p + 1
    end
    remaining = new_remaining
    count = count + 1
  end
  result
end

fn build_output(_ xs: List<Int>) -> String
  mut output = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = xs.len()
  while i < n
    let v = get_at(xs, i)
    if i == 0
      output = "#{v}"
    else
      output = "#{output} #{v}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  output
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums = parse_ints(line1)
let k = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  0
end

let result = top_k_desc(nums, k)
println(build_output(result))
